text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The Ocean Stakes... The warm-up for my Cutie ♪
Derby.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha. Don't worry, I haven't forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But I'm curious about that reaction...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But I'm curious about that reaction...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I know! ♪ I'm gonna run for you today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I know! ♪ I'm gonna run for you today!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Well, it seems like you've forgotten that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally psyched about running, and I wanna
sparkle when I do. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So today, I'm gonna make sure you understand
that. ♪
